name: Yellow Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sliced squash and onion in boiling, lightly salted water for about 3 minutes. Drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine the chicken soup and sour cream. Stir in the shredded carrots, squash, and onions; add salt and pepper to taste.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the stuffing mix with melted butter.
4. Spread half the stuffing mixture in the bottom of a 12 x 7 x 2-inch baking dish.
5. Spoon the vegetable mixture on top of the stuffing.
6. Sprinkle the rest of the stuffing on top of the vegetable mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
